metadata.name: ITC: STRONGHOLD - Device Info
metadata.description: This data model captures device information of MoMo users, extracted during specific events at various touchpoints within the MoMo app, such as login, relogin, and refresh token. The tables are designed to support in-depth analysis of user devices, uncover insights, and extract features for AI/ML models.
